title: Set a UBI Reminder
description: Set a recurring reminder on your phone so you never miss a daily dUSD claim.

dialogue.text: Want to avoid missing daily UBI claims? Let's set up a recurring reminder and validate that your reminder workflow actually runs.

options.text: I already tried but the reminder keeps failing me.

dialogue.text: DSpace cannot create reminders for you. Open your phone's Clock or Reminders app, make it repeat daily, and label it clearly as 'Claim dUSD in DSpace'.

options.text: I cannot get daily repeat configured.

dialogue.text: Evidence step: return to Wallet and confirm you still have at least 100 dBI from your earlier claim so this reminder is tied to an active UBI account.

options.text: Verified dBI balance and reminder label.

dialogue.text: Great. Do you want a strict routine or a lightweight fallback routine if notifications fail?
Strict routine: when the reminder fires, open Wallet immediately, run one basic-income claim, then confirm both dUSD and dBI changed before closing the app.
Fallback routine: if your phone notification is delayed, use a second daily check window (morning/evening) and manually verify Wallet once per window to avoid misses.

Troubleshooting path: if reminders fail, check notification permissions, battery optimization, and timezone settings. If those are locked down by your device, keep a manual calendar backup until reminders are stable.

options.text: I'll proceed with manual daily checks for now.

dialogue.text: Perfect. Your reminder system now has both a primary and recovery path, which keeps your UBI streak resilient.

options.text: Got it. I'll keep the streak alive.
